experience.title: Senior Software Engineer

experience.title: Software Development Engineer Intern
experience.description:
• Design and implement “PingAn Insight” Platform Prototype.
   - Assembled financial-oriented data. Crawled them from multiple database including Wikipedia historical events, NYTimes, BBC, Wall street journal, Reuters and company official websites.
   - Built crawler API, which allows server automatically collect and clean ad-hoc data.
   - Evaluated and organized these financial data and created database to support workable financial analytics.
   - Extracted required information from text data such as annual financial report, by refining the architecture of bidirectional LSTM-CRF model and customizing rule-based algorithm.
   - Applied quantitative analytics to precisely response to the upcoming investment questions.
• FDDC 2018 Financial Algorithm Challenge: Quarterly Revenue Forecast for Public Companies.
   - Developed and adjusted machine learning models, including different tree models, statistical regression, lightGBM, Arima and embedding models, to predict the accurate forecast of companies in A-Share Main-Board Market, based on historical financial statements, market data, macro data, industry data and domain knowledge.
   - The prediction error of revenue was 0.511 and final rank of this competition was 9th/2724.

experience.title: Research Assistant
experience.description:
1) SUMOylation Mechanism over Gene Mutation Repair in Botrytis Cinerea; 
2) Functional Analysis of ABC Transportome of the Pathogenic Fungus Fusarium Graminearum;                   
•	Conducted research on the functional principles of SUMO modification; independently designed experiments based on its characters to rebuild the entire sumo process
•	Commanded the fundamental techniques to accomplish the entire gene knockout flow and obtain certain mutants as well as the fungus cancerization phenotype verification to eventually verify experimental results
•	Independently constructed two Fusarium graminearum mutants; co-acquired 64 ABC transportome, among which the arb1 gene has proven to have the most significant impact over the growing phenotype
•	Co-wrote and published a paper with respect to findings.

experience.title: Research Assistant
experience.description:
•	Developed a clear understanding of fundamental theories of protein evolution, with particular focus on protein domains’ dynamic interactions and their functional annotations
•	Self-studied specific packages of R for utilization and integration with valid materials and practices
•	Programmed R and Pajek environments to perform protein structural analyses and conclude significant inferences about power law evolution and modular behavior of protein domain networks
•	Completed an individual poster presentation in the front of faculty and students
